state.next-action: 2026-04-18 S19. Phase 59 CLOSED. 59-09 DONE: apps/planning-app/app/my-projects/SubagentRunHistory.tsx fleshed out — day-grouped timeline with status pill + model chip + expandable `` panel (duration, short sha, next task, teaching tip, file, scrollable report body); empty state adds copyable `gad subagents dispatch --projectid ` block. Server-side only, native `` element. Verified via `pnpm --filter @portfolio/planning-app build` clean + `next start :3003` SSR check (fixture renders all fields; empty state for claw-cli renders dispatch cmd). 60-05a DONE earlier this session: `gad env audit`/`gad env purge` CLI + `gad start` auto-purge preflight (vendor commit d3cfce1). NEXT options: (a) `gad install` to refresh installed gad.exe (still v1.33.0 pre-ea1ad32) so the new planning serve + narrative + env audit/purge land in $PATH; (b) 60-07 Project Editor BYOK tab (phase 44.5 entry point); (c) phase 42.4 Context Framework as catalog type (sprint 9 head). Pending operator-side: Cursor skill trim verification (fresh Cursor instance should show ~63 skills, not 400+). Parallel-agent caveat: operator runs other agents on CLI harnesses concurrently (memory: project_parallel_agent_work) — 602 pre-existing test failures in spawn/agent-skills/codex/worktree clusters are their WIP, not regressions.
